---
title: "Dashboards"
subtitle: "Interactive analytical tools — each one informs a specific decision"
---

::: {.page-context}
::: {.pc-crumb}
Dashboards <span class="sep">›</span> Overview
:::
::: {.pc-supports}
**Dashboards are where decisions meet data.** Each recomputes from the sample data and links back to
the decision it serves.
:::
::: {.pc-row}
<span class="chip chip-grade-c no-dot">Illustrative · synthetic data</span>
<span class="pc-next">[Open Market Prioritisation](market-prioritisation.qmd)</span>
:::
:::

Each dashboard imports its scoring logic from `src/` and computes live — nothing is hardcoded. Change
a [framework's weights](../frameworks/index.qmd) and re-render, and the numbers move. Every dashboard
names the decision it supports and links back to it.

::: {.cil-cards}
::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">Supports Decision 1</div>
<h3>Market Prioritisation</h3>
<p>Ranks seven candidate segments on a weighted priority score, with live metric cards and a
sensitivity view.</p>
<div class="path-route"><span class="step">Decision: Market Entry</span><span class="arw">·</span><span class="step">Framework</span></div>
<span class="card-go">Open dashboard</span>
[](market-prioritisation.qmd){.stretched-link aria-label="Open Market Prioritisation dashboard"}
:::

::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">Supports the AI thesis</div>
<h3>AI Readiness Scorecard</h3>
<p>Turns the "CRM is the foundation for AI readiness" claim into a measurable, testable index across
customers.</p>
<div class="path-route"><span class="step">Claim: H-CRM-AI</span><span class="arw">·</span><span class="step">Framework</span></div>
<span class="card-go">Open scorecard</span>
[](ai-readiness-scorecard.qmd){.stretched-link aria-label="Open AI Readiness Scorecard"}
:::

::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">Supports Decision 2</div>
<h3>Positioning Dashboard</h3>
<p>Compares the three positioning framings across six weighted criteria, with an interactive radar
profile.</p>
<div class="path-route"><span class="step">Decision: Positioning</span><span class="arw">·</span><span class="step">Framework</span></div>
<span class="card-go">Open dashboard</span>
[](positioning-dashboard.qmd){.stretched-link aria-label="Open Positioning dashboard"}
:::
:::

::: {.callout-warning appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Illustrative only.** All dashboard scores are computed from synthetic sample data and carry
confidence grade C. They demonstrate the machinery and frame the debate; they are not recommendations.
The evidence that would make them trustworthy is tracked under [Evidence](../evidence/index.qmd).
:::
